description: A plain candid event photograph (no on-image text or graphics) from a Department of Labor site visit or training demonstration. In the center, a smiling woman in a blue denim shirt wears orange safety ear-muffs/helmet with a flip-up face shield and clear safety glasses, holding a STIHL chainsaw resting on a cut log; she has a STIHL name badge. To the left, partly out of frame, stands a man in a gray shirt also wearing an orange forestry helmet with face shield. At right (back to camera) a woman in a cream blazer gestures while talking, apparently the official/Secretary touring the demonstration. The background is an outdoor covered pavilion with green trees, a cinder-block pillar, picnic-table sawhorses, and a parked truck. This is a documentary photo with no designed overlay, slogan, or seal, so it is marked not designed; it accompanies a tweet praising 'the hardworking men and women of our nation.'
